scripts.build: turbo run build:crates --filter=@jazz/rust && turbo run build
scripts.ensure:rust-toolchain: export PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" && (command -v rustup >/dev/null 2>&1 || (curl -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y --profile minimal --default-toolchain stable)) && rustup default stable && rustup target add wasm32-unknown-unknown
scripts.build:vercel-docs: pnpm run ensure:rust-toolchain && pnpm run ensure:wasm-pack && export PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" && turbo run build:crates --filter=@jazz/rust && turbo run build
